title: The Negative Revelation
description: A debunk failure reveals what is NOT true — combined with positive evidence, what does mixing 3 and 6 produce?

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing3, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R- (ing2 has R-), ing3=R+ (ing3+ing7=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing2=G+ (ing2 has G+), ing3=G+ (ing3 has G+)
      → SAME sign + → G+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing5, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R- (ing2 has R-), ing5=R+ (ing5+ing8=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing2=G+ (ing2 has G+), ing5=G- (ing5 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing2=B+ (ing2 has B+), ing5=B- (ing5 has B-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.

To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R- (ing2 has R-), ing7=R+ (ing3+ing7=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing2=G+ (ing2 has G+), ing7=G- (ing6+ing7=G-: both share G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing2=B+ (ing2 has B+), ing7=B+ (ing7 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.
